description:
§55.10 Level 1 — an inline message override RENDERS at `` (the RUNTIME half the ss57 codes-only case parked). Typing "A" fails length(>=2); the field's inline override string `"Name must be at least 2 chars"` is what renders inside the `.scrml-error`

, NOT the Level-3 shipped default. Level 1 is per-(cell,validator) and static-string-only (§55.10 / L12 Edge F).
rationale: §55.10 Level 1 (highest precedence): a per-field inline override wins over Level-2 (registered) and Level-3 (shipped default). Unlike the Level-3 default text (impl-freedom, asserted only via `.scrml-error` count in the sibling cases), the Level-1 override string is DEVELOPER-AUTHORED SOURCE — it is normative and asserted verbatim. Pre-fix (msgchain-render-wiring-2026-07-03) the `<errors of=>` render called `_scrml_message_for(tag, field)` WITHOUT the cellName, so the Level-1 lookup never fired and the L3 default rendered; the cellName is now threaded. The paren+static form emits no E-VALIDATOR-INLINE-* code (positive control, mirrors msgchain-inline-static-accepted).

domAnchored.text: Name must be at least 2 chars
